ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the data was collected */,
  "day_type" TEXT /* Type of day (e.g., weekdays, weekends) */,
  "day_slice" TEXT /* Time slice of the day (e.g., early, late) */,
  "model_geography" TEXT /* Model geography (e.g., country, state) */,
  "sub_geography1" TEXT /* First sub-geographic area (e.g., region, district) */,
  "sub_geography2" TEXT /* Second sub-geographic area (e.g., city, town) */,
  "energy_demand" REAL /* Energy demand in the specified unit */,
  "season_energy_demand" REAL /* Seasonal energy demand for the entire season */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the data collection period */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity during the data collection period */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed during the data collection period */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Amount of rainfall during the data collection period */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the geographic area */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the geographic area */,
  "source_of_data" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., manual input, IoT devices) */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_day_type FOREIGN KEY ("day_type") REFERENCES day_types ("day_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_sub_geography1 FOREIGN KEY ("sub_geography1") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_day_slice FOREIGN KEY ("day_slice") REFERENCES time_slices ("time_slice_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_model_geography FOREIGN KEY ("model_geography") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_sub_geography2 FOREIGN KEY ("sub_geography2") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographies" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic entry */,
  "geo_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic area */,
  "geo_level" TEXT /* Level of the geographic area (e.g., country, state, district) */,
  "parent_geo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent geographic area if applicable */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the geographic area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the geographic area */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the geographic region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the geographic area */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the geographic area */,
  "energy_sources" TEXT /* Primary sources of energy in the region (e.g., coal, solar, wind) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., SUMMER, WINTER) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season's characteristics */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the season */,
  "average_humidity" REAL /* Average humidity during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "day_types" (
  "day_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day type */,
  "day_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the day type (e.g., ALLDAYS, WEEKDAYS, WEEKENDS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the day type's significance in energy demand */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the day type */,
  "average_humidity" REAL /* Average humidity during the day type */,
  "public_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the day type includes public holidays */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_slices" (
  "time_slice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time slice */,
  "time_slice_name" TEXT /* Name of the time slice (e.g., EARLY, LATE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time slice's relevance in energy demand */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the time slice */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the time slice */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the time slice */,
  "average_humidity" REAL /* Average humidity during the time slice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_slice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data accessed in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
